title: Feet of Death
overview: When paranormal social media influencer, Chris Dixon, winds up dead near the base of Mt. Saint Helens, Jason Esterly, a USFS ranger, must pull himself out of mourning his late wife to grapple with the reality that Bigfoot could actually exist. The supposed mythical creature might even be responsible for a string of unusual deaths in his small town.
